sTORranI
In the Magha year of Jupiter people would worship the
manes (and parents and elders) with greater devotion, and all beings
would enjoy happiness and contentment as well as sound health.
There would be good rains and good prices for corn ; and people
would live with greater amity and cordiality.
[Cf. n*—
srmxN- gfro ^ i
qr# Tm ^ n
According to this sage the year of Magha would be notable for
treaties among rulers also,]

84 Brhat Samhittt
yq<iHi ^qr^ftw: m\\
In the Phalguna year of Jupiter happiness, rainfall and
crops would be sporadic and young women would be afflicted with
misfortune. Kings would become cruel and aggressive and robbers
would increase enormously.
[Cf.
^ li]
^fcT *Tt^T ^
In the Caitra year of Jupiter rainfall would be scanty, food
costly, but people would enjoy happiness and kings would be-
come kind-hearted. Pulses would thrive, but the beautiful would
suffer.
[Gf, nf:—

The word in the text may mean 'those who live
